item.title: Seasonal Specialties Recalls Members Mark 7' Pre-Lit Twinkling Bucks Due to Burn Hazard
item.company: Online at SamsClub.com from August 2025 through December 2025 for about $170.
item.brand: Online at SamsClub.com from August 2025 through December 2025 for about $170.
item.summary: This recall involves the 7-foot Pre-Lit Twinkling Buck sold under the Member's Mark brand name. It has warm white colored LED lights and a control box for the lights. The recalled model number 990404199 is printed on the cord tag near the adaptor wall plug and on the packaging.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Members Mark 7' Pre-Lit Twinkling Buck.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the Members Mark 7' Pre-Lit Twinkling Buck immediately and contact Seasonal Specialties to request either a full refund or a repair kit. The repair kit includes new instructions on how to connect the wires, color-coded wire labels and a cord tag warning sticker.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
